---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent, strategy variant, or infrastructure improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What feature or improvement are you proposing?

## Motivation
Why would this improve the system? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed approach
How would you implement this? Which agents would be affected?

## Expected impact
What improvement in CAGR, Sharpe, or risk metrics do you expect?

## References
Link to papers, repos, or other sources that support this idea.
